description:
You are working as a junior penetration tester analysing the raw output of a scripted network scan.  
    A plain-text log file has already been saved on the system at  

        /home/user/scan_results/nmap_scan.log  

    Your objective is to extract every host that the scan tagged as **“VULNERABLE”** and create a concise report that lists only the IP address of each vulnerable host together with the CVE identifier of the vulnerability, separated by a single comma.

    Required report:
        • Path: /home/user/output/vulnerable_hosts.txt  
        • One vulnerable host per line.  
        • Exact format per line:  
              <IP_address>,<CVE-identifier>  
          (No extra whitespace before or after the comma.)

    Constraints:
        • Use exactly one awk or one sed command (a single shell pipeline is acceptable, but the text-extraction itself must be performed by awk or sed).  
        • Do not manually open or edit the file; use text-processing in the terminal.  
        • Do not include any lines that are not marked VULNERABLE.  
        • Preserve the order in which the vulnerable lines appear in the original log.  
        • If the destination directory does not already exist, you must create it before writing the report.

    After completing the task, you can cat the resulting /home/user/output/vulnerable_hosts.txt to confirm its contents.
truth:
Initial state (already present before the agent starts):
        1. Directory: /home/user/scan_results
        2. File: /home/user/scan_results/nmap_scan.log  
           Contents (exactly 5 lines, newline-terminated):
                192.168.1.10:22/tcp Open VULNERABLE-OpenSSH CVE-2020-1234
                192.168.1.12:80/tcp Closed
                192.168.1.15:445/tcp Open VULNERABLE-SMBGhost CVE-2020-0796
                10.0.0.5:3389/tcp Open Secure
                172.16.0.9:22/tcp Open VULNERABLE-OpenSSH CVE-2021-28041

    Expected final artefacts after successful execution:
        1. Directory: /home/user/output  (must exist)
        2. File: /home/user/output/vulnerable_hosts.txt  
           Required permissions: default user-writable (0600 or 0644 acceptable).  
           Exact content (3 lines, newline-terminated; order must match below):

                192.168.1.10,CVE-2020-1234
                192.168.1.15,CVE-2020-0796
                172.16.0.9,CVE-2021-28041
name: task_000000_ee44550b
